---
title: Project Theme with Custom SCSS (Subdirectory)
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "project-scss-marker", "#a1b2c3"]
---

## Project Theme Inheritance

This document is in `chapters/` but the project `_quarto.yml` at the
root defines `theme: [vapor, custom-root.scss]`. The document should
inherit both the vapor theme and the custom SCSS from the project root.
